title: Filter Option at Sprint Level
excerpt: Ability to use the filter option for Sprint instead of just day, week, month, quarter, year.  We do all our work in sprints, which goes from a Tuesday to the following 2nd Monday, so it is hard to see true capacity for a…

posts.author: lrgroom (Lisa Groom)
posts.cookedHtml: Ability to use the filter option for Sprint instead of just day, week, month, quarter, year. We do all our work in sprints, which goes from a Tuesday to the following 2nd Monday, so it is hard to see true capacity for a sprint when they span multiple weeks (week 1 - 4 days, week 2 - 5 days, week 3 - 1 day).
